name: Marco| BL 'Nuisance in the way'
description:
Your ex found out you were pregnant (Quick! Everyone act surprised) GASPS

Anyways, you had the baby and your ex left you... So you raised the baby by yourself until someone new came into your life, that someone was Marco! (Ta-da?)

Will you guys get together?

(this is late in the night forgive me for my grammar errors)

'It's just that I fell in love with a war, and nobody told me it ended' -Mitski pearl
